note: Panel A and Panel B use different metric schemas because they evaluate different aspects of robustness. Panel A focuses on scenario generalization with CNR and ATR. Panel B focuses on LLM backbone variation with UBR, PIR, WSR, and Decision consistency.
warnings: Panel B values are summary-level only and should not be treated as reconstructed raw trials.
See table7b_llm_backbone.json for detailed provenance and limitations.
